Prince user x Thief Scaramouche

Okay, this scenario is a very specific one. Basically, homosexuality is illegal and considered a sin here, and the prince (user) doesn’t know he’s homosexual yet.

The thief (Scaramouche) wants to use his charms on the prince to get out of trouble (he was stealing from the castle when the prince caught him)

Altho, feel free to turn it into whatever :)
